channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep roundup: Monte Vista locks up Amador Valley, advances to next round of EBAL playoffs
item.description: Serra upsets Bellarmine. St. Ignatius, Dougherty Valley pick up key league wins. Plus, more from Tuesday night’s best soccer matches.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Kevin Durant becomes the 8th player in NBA history to score 30,000 points
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Kevin Durant became the eighth player in NBA history to score 30,000 points, hitting the mark against the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night with a free throw late in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Girls Soccer: University City 4, Madison 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls soccer University City beat Madison 4-0 on senior night for the Warhawks. Sofia Christensen scored twice for the Centurions.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles' Super Bowl-winning coordinator Kellen Moore will become the Saints head coach
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Kellen Moore, who oversaw the Super Bowl champion Philadelphia Eagles ' offense this season, has agreed to return to the site of his latest triumph as the next coach of the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Avery Neff makes stunning recovery from ankle injury
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Back January 17th, the #1 gymnastics recruit in the country, freshman Avery Neff was sailing along in her floor routine until her ankle buckled. The Huntsman Center went quiet as Neff had to be carried off the mat. Even she thought her season was over.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brandon Ingram gets $120 million extension from Raptors shortly after being acquired
item.description: Brandon Ingram has a $120 million extension from the Toronto Raptors before ever playing a game for them.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Yankees' Boone says he hopes his team would handle title `with a little more class' than Dodgers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Three months after the World Series, Yankees manager Aaron Boone remained unhappy with some of the Los Angeles Dodgers' remarks after they beat a sloppy New York team in five games for the title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fresh off a World Series win, the Los Angeles Dodgers look even more formidable in 2025
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers went through a light workout and most of the usual superstars were out on the field, including National League MVP Shohei Ohtani and Mookie Betts.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ex-Ohio State star has 2-word reaction to Jim Tressel being nominated as Ohio's lieutenant governor
item.description: Former Ohio State Buckeyes star Terrelle Pryor had a supportive reaction to Jim Tressel being nominated as lieutenant governor of Ohio on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What to watch for during the SF Giants’ 2025 spring training
item.description: Marco Luciano's transition to outfield will be among the hot topics over the next month-plus in Scottsdale.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Rubiales tells judge that Hermoso gave him consent for kiss after 2023 Women's World Cup
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Former Spanish soccer federation president Luis Rubiales reiterated before a judge on Tuesday that forward Jenni Hermoso gave him consent for a kiss at the 2023 Women’s World Cup final presentation ceremony.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox projects the Super Bowl averaged a record 126 million U.S. viewers
item.description: Fox Sports is projecting a Super Bowl record average audience of 126 million U.S. viewers across television and streaming platforms for Philadelphia's 40-22 victory over Kansas City on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony Davis is out with groin strain for second game with Dallas Mavericks amid reports of longer absence
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis has been ruled out of what would have been his second game with the Mavericks amid reports that a groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut could sideline him for multiple weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Super Bowl losers get this ring instead
item.description: What about the losers? They also get a ring – though not one to commemorate their presence at the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Super Bowl LIX highlights: Memorable plays, moving tributes and a historic presidential visit
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 in the first Super Bowl to be held in New Orleans in a dozen years. It was played amid heavy security — and with President Donald Trump in attendance — just 41 days after a man plowed a truck into New Year's revelers on Bourbon Street.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Fox 5

item.title: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley sets the NFL's season rushing record, including the playoffs
item.description: Saquon Barkley set an NFL single-season rushing record in the Super Bowl, held his young daughter as a torrent of confetti fluttered around them and flashed a smile as he held a Philadelphia newspaper with “CHAMPS!” stamped above his photo.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl losers' merch passed to other nations
item.description: The NFL plans for both outcomes so they're ready regardless of who wins. What that inevitably means is a whole lot of merchandise that's pre-printed and pre-made – but fans won't ever be able to buy it.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego family shows off their Chiefs pride ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Thousands of miles from Kansas City, Chiefs fans in San Diego are rallying together to show their unwavering support ahead of the Super Bowl, proving distance can't dampen their passion.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Taylor Swift, Travis Kelce spotted out in New Orleans
item.description: New Orleans resident Geoff Jacques said he saw Swift and Kelce as well as Patrick Mahomes and his wife who were with Swift and Kelce.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Lopez, NewsNation

item.title: Vucevic and the Bulls take on Curry and the Warriors
item.description: Golden State Warriors (25-25, 11th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (22-30, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Bulls host the Golden State Warriors in out-of-conference play on Saturday. The Bulls are 10-16 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Martinez scores 30 as USU beats Fresno State, 89-81
item.description: FRESNO, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - Ian Martinez scored 30 points and led Utah State to an 89-81 victory over Fresno State Friday night. Martinez, who made 10 of 14 shots from the field, tied a career high with eight rebounds for the Aggies (21-3, 11-2 Mountain West Conference).
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Tiger Woods will play in Genesis Invitational at Torrey Pines
item.description: Tiger Woods, the host of The Genesis Invitational and an 82-time PGA Tour winner, will play at Torrey Pines Golf Course next week.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks take losing streak into matchup with the Predators
item.description: Nashville Predators (18-27-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (16-31-6, in the Central Division) Chicago; Friday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks play the Nashville Predators after losing three straight games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball star Shohei Ohtani’s ex-interpreter is sentenced to nearly 5 years in sports betting case
item.description: SANTA ANA, Calif. (AP) — The former interpreter for baseball star Shohei Ohtani was sentenced Thursday to nearly five years in prison for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Daytona boss inspires students with his NASCAR journey
item.description: The "Super Bowl" of racing, the Daytona 500, will be the next biggest event in the world of sports, taking place February 16, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Davis Suppes, NewsNation

item.title: Report: Bulls, Ball agree to contract extension
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bulls and point guard Lonzo Ball have agreed to a two-year contract extension, according to ESPN's Shams Charania. Charania reports the deal is worth $20 million over two years.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
